entry.title: Auto dunning run using standard program is not picking only few open items.
entry.content: Auto dunning run using standard program is not picking only few open items.

entry.title: SAP FBL5N NOT DISPLAYING THE CORRECT CONTRACT NUMBER IN REFERENCE KEY 2 FIELD
entry.content: SAP FBL5N NOT DISPLAYING THE CORRECT CONTRACT NUMBER IN REFERENCE KEY 2 FIELD

entry.title: Unable to reverse settlement in WBS through CJ88 (error message AA462)
entry.content:
We need to reverse a settlement to two WBS PL/21002/06-02 and PL/21002/06-03. Originally settlement was run through CJ8G t-code. While trying to reverse through CJ88, following error appears-

Quote -

 You cannot reverse this transaction ...

     Message no. AA462

 Diagnosis

     The asset line items belonging to this transaction were already reversed
     or are themselves reversal postings. In either case, the system does not
     allow another reversal. Reversed documents and the reversal documents
     for them are automatically marked as such, and you cannot process them
     further.

 

 Procedure

     Check your choice of document. If you really need to reverse this
     document, then you have to manually post a document with reversed
     positive/negative signs from the original posting (back out the posting)
     rather than posting a reversal.

 

Unquote

entry.title: Best Practice Activation Error/SMB99/CRTX_CRHD_LANG_O001 -Text for Work Center component :SV-CLD-PC
entry.content:
We are working on Us Best practice activation in S5P system,

We are getting error "/SMB99/CRTX_CRHD_LANG_O001 -Text for the Work Center " 

Activation logs shows "US_VAR0001 Entry does not exist in"

Attached screenshots for reference.

entry.title: Withholding Tax Not Recognized in SD Customer Invoices
entry.content:
Hello all,

We need to issue customer invoices and credit notes through the SD module with withholding tax applied to customers. However, the withholding tax is not being recognized or calculated by the system during the billing process.

Business Scenario Our business requires that certain customers are subject to withholding tax, which should be reflected in the SD billing documents and the corresponding accounting postings.

Issue Although the relevant customer master data and withholding tax settings have been maintained, the system does not determine or apply withholding tax when creating SD billing documents. As a result, the withholding tax amount is not reflected in the invoice or in the related accounting document.

Could you please help us understand:

  1. Whether this scenario is supported in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
  2. The required configuration steps to enable withholding tax for customer invoices created through SD billing.
  3. Any prerequisites, business roles, master data settings, tax codes, or SSCUIs that need to be maintained.
  4. Any known limitations regarding withholding tax processing in SD billing documents.

Thank you for your help.

Kind regards,

Marlene

entry.title: Chart of Depreciation created with Reference and can see Depreciation areas copied
entry.content: New Chart of Depreciation created with Reference(Which has only 01,15,32 Dep.areas) and can see Depreciation areas automatically copied with 1,15,31,32,33 in table T093A, but not in Table T093. I manually created dep.areas 34 &35 with IFRS Accounting principle and this is causing issue while creating the Chart of depreciation area assignment to company code it shows the error as "Parallel crcy area (crcy type 30) missing for area 34 ch. of deprec. XXXX". How to fix it and how to assign the company code to chart of depreciation.

entry.title: PEXR2002 - Payment IDOC ,Vendor line item text update limitations for payment methods.
entry.content: SAP Payments Via IDOC Basic message type PEXR2002 , is updating the vendor line item text into the segment E1EDP02 for the 070 qualifier and this update is happening to few payment methods only like Payment method "A" domestic and international vendors and for payment method "D" only for the international vendors. Payment method "V" not updating to international vendors, Any standard limitation exists for the update of Vendor line item text. Please suggest this has to be addressed with the custom logic only.

entry.title: RITA - Additional countries
entry.content:
Hello,

i have a question in regard of RITA: is there a schedule anywhere that shows when additional countries will be supported ?

I already found the roadmap explorer, where the added countries in the past are listed: 

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67837800100800007389&range=FIRST-LAST&q=RITA#Q3%202020

On SAP Help there is just a list of existing countries:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/c1ad3b9870bf48838629704f6bbb3a37.html?locale=en-US

So, where do i get information which countries will be activated in the future?

Kind regards

Fabian

entry.title: FAA_CMP Issue in Developement 110
entry.content: The Legacy Data Status is currently showing as "Ongoing (Other Postings Allowed)". Since depreciation for fiscal year 2020 has not been posted, I am unable to execute asset accounting transactions such as AFAB and AJAB. Kindly advise how to change this status or resolve the issue so that the pending depreciation and asset postings can be processed.

entry.title: Mapping and configuration for security deposit paid on lease- In contracts
entry.content:
Hello,

How do we map and process security deposits paid using RE-fx. Standard functionality is available only for security deposit received

entry.title: Chart of Accounts strategy for multi-country group implementation — which approach is recommended?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are implementing SAP FI for a group headquartered in Country A (HQ), with 3 Company Codes located in:

  • Country B 
  • Country C 
  • Country D 

Each subsidiary operates under a different local accounting standard. We are trying to decide on the right Chart of Accounts (COA) architecture and would appreciate feedback from consultants who have implemented similar multi-country scenarios.

We have identified 4 possible approaches:

  1. Single unified Operational COA for the whole group (no Country COA) simple, but doesn't natively support each country's local legal/fiscal reporting requirements.
  2. Local Operational COA per country + Group COA for consolidation (using the Alternative Account Number field)  each Company Code posts directly in its local GAAP, and the Group COA handles consolidation at HQ level.
  3. Unified Operational COA for daily group reporting + local Country COA per subsidiary for legal/fiscal compliance daily postings use the group-harmonized COA, and a Country Specific COA (mapped via Alternative Account Number) is used for statutory/tax reporting.
  4. All three COA types simultaneously (Operational + Group + Country) maximum coverage but heavier configuration and maintenance.

Our questions:

  • Which of these architectures is most commonly recommended for a group with 3+ subsidiaries under different local GAAPs?
  • In practice, does the end user post a single journal entry, with SAP handling the account mapping automatically via the Alternative Account Number field (OB13/OB62 configuration)? Or are there cases requiring separate postings?
  • Are there real-world limitations or pitfalls with Approach 2 or 3 when it comes to VAT reporting, financial statement versions (FSV), or statutory audit file requirements?
  • Any SAP Notes, Best Practices documentation, or real implementation experience you could share would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance for your insights!
SAP S/4HANA Finance  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Finance  SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting

entry.title: Best Practice for Excluding Cash Advance Customers from Credit Checks
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Credit Management, what is the recommended approach to exclude cash advance customers from credit checks without impacting other credit scenarios?

Have you used custom routines, credit segments, or standard configuration to achieve this?

entry.title: nternal Order Budget Exceed Error | PO 4700004639 Item 45 | IO 100018736
entry.content:
Please look into an issue with Purchase Order line item processing due to an internal order budget constraint.

Details of the Issue:

  • Purchase Order (PO): 4700004639

  • PO Line Item: 45

  • Internal Order (IO): 100018736

  •

entry.title: kob1 by the variant selection orders no actual line items were selected-KB420
entry.content: We use transaction kob1- Orders: Actual Line Items or S_ALR_87012993- Orders: Actual/Plan/Variance. When the selection variant orders is filled in selection parameter 'Order Group'  report returns error message KB420 "No actual line items were selected".  However there are actual line items by the orders which are contented in this order group when they  are filled in selection parameter Order. There are no issues with authorization.

entry.title: KSH2 Kostenstellengruppen anlegen
entry.content:
KSH2 In der EHP6 öffnet sich ein Eingabefeld mit 5 Eingabemöglichkeiten.

In EHP8 ist dies dann nicht mehr möglich.

Hier kann nur noch eine Kostenstelle angelegt werden.

entry.title: kob1 by the variant selection orders no actual line items were selected-KB420
entry.content: We use transaction kob1- Orders: Actual Line Items or S_ALR_87012993- Orders: Actual/Plan/Variance. When the selection variant orders is filled in selection parameter 'Order Group'  report returns error message KB420 "No actual line items were selected".  However there are actual line items by the orders which are contented in this order group when they  are filled in selection parameter Order. There are no issues with authorization.

entry.title: Internal order description is not visible in KOH3

in KOH3 we cannot see the description of internal orders which is visible in KOH2

entry.title: KOB1n and KOB1 is not matching with trial balance
entry.content: KOB1n and KOB1 is not matching with trial balance, while running kob1n report company code wise the balance is not zero but as per trial the balance is zero also, this is impacting financial closing.

entry.title: Not Able to Partial Retire Asset with T-code - F-92
entry.content:
Asset code – 1000044114
Company code – 1000
Acquisition date – 31.07.2026 Current Year

It is not able to do Partial Retire with T-code F-92 and Transaction Type is used 210

But It is working for different Asset code

Asset code – 1100068355
Company code – 1000
Acquisition date – 31.07.2026 Current Year

For this Asset code entry is posted successfully with Transaction Type 210
